mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gb_site_title_batch_relations ( site_id, title_batch_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{titleBatchId}, #{relationType}, #{isVisible}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

INSERT INTO gb_site_title_batch_relations ( site_id, title_batch_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{relatedId}, #{relationType}, CASE WHEN #{relationType} = 'shared' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

INSERT INTO gb_site_title_batch_relations ( site_id, title_batch_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.siteId}, #{item.relatedId}, #{item.relationType}, CASE WHEN #{item.relationType} = 'shared' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE gb_site_title_batch_relations
is_visible = #{isVisible},
relation_type = #{relationType},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gb_site_title_batch_relations (site_id, title_batch_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.siteId}, #{item.titleBatchId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.isVisible}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_type = VALUES(relation_type), is_visible = VALUES(is_visible), update_time = NOW()
